candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label and matches Net sales values; preferred candidate is available.

variables.notes: Used the provided revenue candidate. Single reported revenue line preferred.

candidates.why: Unique direct COGS line; avoids ambiguity from duplicate 'Cost of goods sold' labels, one of which appears to be a component/misclassified line.
Direct COGS wording, but duplicated in the statement and therefore less precise than the unique consolidated COGS label.
Appears to be a component/subdetail rather than the main COGS line.

variables.notes: CR:c|low|misclassified. Preferred the unique main COGS row to avoid duplicate-label ambiguity.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component above operating income.
Clear SG&A overhead component above operating income.
Dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense; included in XSGA as well so that XSGA-XRD removes it per rule.
Explicit SG&A label exists but appears unpopulated in preview; less reliable as sole choice.
Overhead-like bucket, but contains mixed items including depreciation/impairment/FX/capital loss, so less clean for SG&A.
Subcomponent of selling expense, likely already embedded in Selling and marketing expenses.
Subcomponent of administrative expense, likely already embedded in Administrative expenses.
Potential overhead bucket, but likely overlaps substantially with reported selling/admin lines.

variables.notes: Used overhead component rows rather than mixed 'Other operating expenses'. Included R&D in XSGA because it is separately reported above operating income and not clearly embedded in the selected SG&A component rows.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line reported above operating income.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: Amortization, not current-period R&D expense; not preferred for XRD.
Granular recurring interest expense on borrowings; preferred over total financial expenses.
Recurring lease-related interest expense; should be included with interest costs.
Recurring financing-related pension interest cost.
Broader finance-cost total, but includes non-interest items and should be avoided when granular components exist.
Ambiguous bucket that may include non-interest finance items.
Derivative-related and not clearly recurring plain interest; lower preference.
Derivative-related and not clearly recurring plain interest; lower preference.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Looks like a supplemental duplicate of lease interest, so avoid double counting alongside 'Interest expenses, leases'.
Generic label exists but appears unpopulated in preview and is less specific than detailed components.

variables.notes: Selected granular recurring interest-related rows and excluded total financial expenses to avoid mixing in fair value and other non-interest items.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders equity attributable to equity holders of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Best owner/parent-only equity line; excludes non-controlling interests and is ideal for book equity.
Would include non-controlling interests, so only fallback if owner-only equity were unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders equity attributable to equity holders of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Preferred parent-equity line to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet NCI line; best match for minority interest.
Equivalent NCI label and valid fallback across years.
Income-statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet MIB.
Income-statement minority allocation, not balance-sheet equity interest.
OCI allocation detail, not balance-sheet minority equity.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet NCI labels as priority list.
